languages.text: "В этом есть резон. Мои исследования достаточно важны для Человечества, чтобы единожды возложить на жертвенный алтарь мое достоинство. Да простит Омниссия мою слабость перед лицом врага".
"Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."
languages.original_text: "В этом есть резон. Мои исследования достаточно важны для Человечества, чтобы единожды возложить на жертвенный алтарь мое достоинство. Да простит Омниссия мою слабость перед лицом врага".

traits.locale_text: "Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."
"Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."

"Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."
"Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."

languages.text: "Was Ihr sagt, ist vernünftig. Meine Arbeit ist für die Menschheit wichtig genug, um meine Würde zu opfern. Möge mir der Omnissiah meine Schwäche im Angesicht des Feindes vergeben."
languages.original_text: "Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."

traits.locale_text: "Was Ihr sagt, ist vernünftig. Meine Arbeit ist für die Menschheit wichtig genug, um meine Würde zu opfern. Möge mir der Omnissiah meine Schwäche im Angesicht des Feindes vergeben."

languages.text: « Votre raisonnement est correct. Mon travail est utile à l'humanité et mérite que je lui sacrifie ma dignité. Puisse l'Omnimessie pardonner ma faiblesse face à mon adversaire. »
languages.original_text: "Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."

traits.locale_text: « Votre raisonnement est correct. Mon travail est utile à l'humanité et mérite que je lui sacrifie ma dignité. Puisse l'Omnimessie pardonner ma faiblesse face à mon adversaire. »

languages.text: «Es un razonamiento sólido. Mi trabajo es tan importante para la Humanidad como para justificar el sacrificio de mi dignidad. Que el Omnissiah me perdone por ser débil ante el enemigo».
languages.original_text: "Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."

traits.locale_text: «Es un razonamiento sólido. Mi trabajo es tan importante para la Humanidad como para justificar el sacrificio de mi dignidad. Que el Omnissiah me perdone por ser débil ante el enemigo».

languages.text: "Mantığınız çok sağlam. Çalışmalarım İnsanlık adına yürütüyorum. Haysiyetimi feda etmemi gerektirecek kadar önemliler. Düşman karşısındaki zayıflığım için Hermesih beni bağışlasın."
languages.original_text: "Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."

traits.locale_text: "Mantığınız çok sağlam. Çalışmalarım İnsanlık adına yürütüyorum. Haysiyetimi feda etmemi gerektirecek kadar önemliler. Düşman karşısındaki zayıflığım için Hermesih beni bağışlasın."

languages.text: “您的论证很充分。我的研究对人类至关重要，值得牺牲这点尊严。愿欧姆尼赛亚宽恕我在敌人面前的软弱。”
languages.original_text: "Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."

traits.locale_text: “您的论证很充分。我的研究对人类至关重要，值得牺牲这点尊严。愿欧姆尼赛亚宽恕我在敌人面前的软弱。”

languages.text: 「あなたの論拠は筋が通っています。私の仕事は、自らの尊厳を犠牲にするに値するほど、人類にとって重要です。オムニッシアが、敵を前にした私の弱さに、赦しを与えてくださいますように」
languages.original_text: "Your reasoning is sound. My work is important enough to Humanity to warrant the sacrifice of my dignity. May the Omnissiah grant absolution for my weakness before the foe."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの論拠は筋が通っています。私の仕事は、自らの尊厳を犠牲にするに値するほど、人類にとって重要です。オムニッシアが、敵を前にした私の弱さに、赦しを与えてくださいますように」
